ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matters" (
  "matter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal matter */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client associated with the matter */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the matter */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the matter is critical */,
  "closure_date" TEXT /* The date on which the matter is closed */,
  "is_duplicate" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the matter is a duplicate */,
  "matter_status" TEXT /* Current status of the matter (e.g., Open, In Progress, Closed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the matter (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the matter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the matter was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the matter */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the matter was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matter_center" (
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration group */,
  "site_column_name" TEXT /* Name of the site column */,
  "column_type" TEXT /* Type of the column (e.g., Text, Boolean, DateTime) */,
  "sub_column_type" TEXT /* Subtype of the column (e.g., None, RadioButtons) */,
  "values" TEXT /* Possible values for the column */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the configuration group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the configuration is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_column_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "matter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the matter the document is associated with */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path of the document */,
  "upload_option" TEXT /* The method used to upload the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* The date on which the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" INTEGER /* The type of the document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the document */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the document was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_matter_id FOREIGN KEY ("matter_id") REFERENCES matters ("matter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_document_type FOREIGN KEY ("document_type") REFERENCES document_types ("document_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the user within the firm */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_communication" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication event */,
  "matter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the matter the communication is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who communicated with the client */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* The date of the communication */,
  "communication_type" INTEGER /* The type of communication (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the communication */,
  "communication_status" TEXT /* Status of the communication (e.g., Draft, Sent, Received) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the communication log */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the communication log was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the communication log */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the communication log was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_communication_communication_type FOREIGN KEY ("communication_type") REFERENCES communication_types ("communication_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_communication_matter_id FOREIGN KEY ("matter_id") REFERENCES matters ("matter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_communication_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matter_users" (
  "matter_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between matter and user */,
  "matter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the matter */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the matter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the association was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the association was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matter_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matter_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matter_users_matter_id FOREIGN KEY ("matter_id") REFERENCES matters ("matter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matter_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "matter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the matter the note is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* The date the note was created */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the note */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the note was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matter_notes_matter_id FOREIGN KEY ("matter_id") REFERENCES matters ("matter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matter_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matter_closure" (
  "closure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the closure event */,
  "matter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the matter being closed */,
  "closure_date" TEXT /* The date on which the matter is closed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the closure of the matter */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the matter closure */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who closed the matter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the matter was closed */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the closure information */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the closure information was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("closure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matter_closure_matter_id FOREIGN KEY ("matter_id") REFERENCES matters ("matter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the document type was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the document type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_types" (
  "communication_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the communication type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the communication type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the communication type was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the communication type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
